frameworks.title: National Research Priorities Framework
frameworks.summary: Cross-ministry coordination model aligning laboratory, institutional, and industry research with national science and technology roadmaps.

frameworks.title: Open Science Access Policy
frameworks.summary: Mandatory open-access publication and data-sharing standards for publicly funded research programs and national laboratories.

frameworks.title: Research Ethics Governance Standard
frameworks.summary: Institutional review requirements, consent standards, and risk-tiered review for human-subject and dual-use research.

policy.title: Laboratory Authorization Policy
policy.summary: Classification, permitting, and oversight rules for Tier 1 through Tier 3 national research laboratories.

policy.title: Dual-Use Review Policy
policy.summary: Risk assessment and publication review requirements for research with potential defensive or harmful dual-use applications.

policy.title: Research Data Retention Policy
policy.summary: Retention periods, provenance metadata, and secure archival requirements for datasets generated under national programs.

standard.title: Peer Review Quality Standard
standard.summary: Minimum review depth, conflict-of-interest checks, and reproducibility documentation for program publications.

standard.title: Attribution and Citation Standard
standard.summary: Mandatory contributor attribution, software citation rules, and dataset citation requirements for national research outputs.

standard.title: Research Safety Training Standard
standard.summary: Required foundational and role-based safety training for researchers before unsupervised lab or field access.
